spec.name: Guard Barracks
spec.description: The barracks carry the permanent smell of oil, leather, and close-quartered humanity. Bunk beds line the walls three high, each with a small wooden box at the foot for a guard's personal effects. Racks of polished equipment fill one corner — breastplates, bucklers, and shortswords in a state of meticulous maintenance that speaks to too much time and not enough work. A large hearth dominates the south wall, flanked by mismatched chairs clearly claimed from various parts of the town over the years. A worn chessboard sits abandoned on a table, mid-game, the pieces dusty as if the players simply walked away and never came back.
